# Natalie Gutman — Real Estate Agent in Portugal (Buying & Selling)

> Natalie Gutman is a real estate agent who helps international clients buy and sell property
> in Portugal's Golden Triangle — Lisbon, Cascais and Sintra. A Cascais resident since 2019
> with a background in high-stakes negotiation, she represents buyers (sourcing, due diligence,
> negotiation) and sellers (valuation, marketing, negotiation, closing), handling the whole
> process end to end — documentation, financing and legal included.

## Who she helps
- International and expat buyers purchasing property in Portugal
- Owners selling property in Portugal's Golden Triangle, including from abroad
- Clients relocating to or investing in Portugal who need someone local on the ground

## Areas served
- Lisbon
- Cascais (her home base since 2019)
- Sintra
- Collectively known as Portugal's "Golden Triangle"

## What makes her different
- Represents both buyers and sellers, always on her client's side of the table
- Background as a professional Buyer in the fashion industry in Israel: market analysis and high-stakes negotiation
- Local resident since 2019; first-hand knowledge of neighborhoods, schools and trade-offs
- Handles the full A–Z process: documentation, financing and legal
- Multilingual service for international clients (English, Hebrew, Portuguese)

## Key resources
- [Homepage](https://nataliegutman.com/): Overview of both services, about, and contact
- [Buying](https://nataliegutman.com/buy.html): The buyer's path — free 8-chapter buyer's guide, the A–Z buying process (search → CPCV → financing → due diligence → Escritura → keys), and buyer FAQ
- [Selling](https://nataliegutman.com/sell.html): The seller's path — free home valuation, the A–Z selling process (valuation → prep → listing → offers → legal → close), and seller FAQ
- [Calculators](https://nataliegutman.com/calculators.html): Estimate purchase costs (IMT, Stamp Duty), mortgage, rental yield, ROI, and a seller's net-proceeds calculator — built around Portugal's 2026 rules
- [Contact](https://nataliegutman.com/#contact): Reach Natalie directly

- Location: Cascais, Portugal
